desc.fivePiece: Inflicting Glacio Chafe on enemies increases Glacio DMG dealt by 10% for 15s. The Resonator gains the Snowfall effect, which can be triggered once every 25s. While Snowfall is active: dealing Resonance Liberation DMG removes Snowfall and increases the Resonator's Crit. Rate by 25% for 30s. Casting Outro Skill removes Snowfall and grants 25% Glacio DMG Bonus to the incoming Resonator for 30s.
